'''lomahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:huffed|huffed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huffed|huffed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lomahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomahithi|lomahithi]] || [[word:lomahiji|lomahiji]] || [[word:lomahishi|lomahishi]] || [[word:lomahiki|lomahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomahuthuthu|lomahuthuthu]] || [[word:lomahujuju|lomahujuju]] || [[word:lomahushushu|lomahushushu]] || [[word:lomahukuku|lomahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomahuthu|lomahuthu]] || [[word:lomahuju|lomahuju]] || [[word:lomahushu|lomahushu]] || [[word:lomahuku|lomahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomahufthuf|lomahufthuf]] || [[word:lomahufjuf|lomahufjuf]] || [[word:lomahufshuf|lomahufshuf]] || [[word:lomahufkuf|lomahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomahethe|lomahethe]] || [[word:lomaheje|lomaheje]] || [[word:lomaheshe|lomaheshe]] || [[word:lomaheke|lomaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomahothotho|lomahothotho]] || [[word:lomahojojo|lomahojojo]] || [[word:lomahoshosho|lomahoshosho]] || [[word:lomahokoko|lomahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomahotho|lomahotho]] || [[word:lomahojo|lomahojo]] || [[word:lomahosho|lomahosho]] || [[word:lomahoko|lomahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomahofthof|lomahofthof]] || [[word:lomahofjof|lomahofjof]] || [[word:lomahofshof|lomahofshof]] || [[word:lomahofkof|lomahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfthÃŸf|lomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfjÃŸf|lomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfshÃŸf|lomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfkÃŸf|lomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lomahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lomahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lomahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lomahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfthÃŸf|lomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfjÃŸf|lomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfshÃŸf|lomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfkÃŸf|lomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfthÃŸf|lomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfjÃŸf|lomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfshÃŸf|lomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomahÃŸfkÃŸf|lomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomahÃḊthÃḊ|lomahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lomahÃḊjÃḊ|lomahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lomahÃḊshÃḊ|lomahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lomahÃḊkÃḊ|lomahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomahathatha|lomahathatha]] || [[word:lomahajaja|lomahajaja]] || [[word:lomahashasha|lomahashasha]] || [[word:lomahakaka|lomahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomahatha|lomahatha]] || [[word:lomahaja|lomahaja]] || [[word:lomahasha|lomahasha]] || [[word:lomahaka|lomahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomahafthaf|lomahafthaf]] || [[word:lomahafjaf|lomahafjaf]] || [[word:lomahafshaf|lomahafshaf]] || [[word:lomahafkaf|lomahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lomahasha|lomahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomahshÃḋsha|lomahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomahrosha|lomahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomahmusha|lomahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomahyasha|lomahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomahnkshÃḋsha|golomahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomahnkrosha|golomahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomahnkmusha|golomahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomahnkyasha|golomahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lomamahasha|lomamahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomamahshÃḋsha|lomamahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomamahrosha|lomamahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomamahmusha|lomamahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomamahyasha|lomamahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomamahnkshÃḋsha|golomamahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomamahnkrosha|golomamahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomamahnkmusha|golomamahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomamahnkyasha|golomamahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lemÃḊhasha|lemÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lemÃḊhshÃḋsha|lemÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lemÃḊhrosha|lemÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lemÃḊhmusha|lemÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lemÃḊhyasha|lemÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golemÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|golemÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golemÃḊhnkrosha|golemÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golemÃḊhnkmusha|golemÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golemÃḊhnkyasha|golemÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lomfahasha|lomfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomfahshÃḋsha|lomfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomfahrosha|lomfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomfahmusha|lomfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomfahyasha|lomfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomfahnkshÃḋsha|golomfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomfahnkrosha|golomfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomfahnkmusha|golomfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomfahnkyasha|golomfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
